tasks.label: Build Manuscript (PDF)
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && for f in $(ls manuscript/chapters/*.md 2>/dev/null | sort); do cat "$f"; echo; done | pandoc - -o build/chronikon.pdf --metadata title="Chronikon"

tasks.label: Build Manuscript (epub)
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && for f in $(ls manuscript/chapters/*.md 2>/dev/null | sort); do cat "$f"; echo; done | pandoc - -o build/chronikon.epub --metadata title="Chronikon"

tasks.label: Preview Manuscript (HTML)
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && for f in $(ls manuscript/chapters/*.md 2>/dev/null | sort); do cat "$f"; echo; done | pandoc - -o build/chronikon.html --standalone --metadata title="Chronikon" && open build/chronikon.html || start build/chronikon.html
